info.name: Huly Platform API
info.description: Huly exposes programmatic access through the Node.js SDK @hcengineering/api-client rather than a documented public HTTP REST API with stable endpoint paths. The SDK connects to the platform transactor over WebSocket (connect) or via a REST client (connectRest), authenticating with email/password or a token. The items below document the supported SDK operations; they are not fixed public REST endpoints. No fabricated request URLs are included.

request.description: SDK: connect(url, { workspace, email, password } | { workspace, token }). Establishes a persistent WebSocket connection to the Huly Platform transactor (e.g. wss://<host>/transactor). This is an SDK transactor protocol, not a documented public REST endpoint.
SDK: connectRest(url, { workspace, email, password } | { workspace, token }). Uses standard HTTP requests via the SDK. No fixed public REST endpoint paths/schemas are published by Huly.

item.name: Fetch
item.description: Document read operations exposed by the SDK.

request.description: SDK: client.findOne(_class, query, options). Returns the first document matching the query. Invoked through the SDK, not via a public REST path.
SDK: client.findAll(_class, query, options). Returns documents with filtering, sorting, and pagination. Invoked through the SDK.

item.name: Documents
item.description: Document write operations exposed by the SDK.

request.description: SDK: client.createDoc(_class, space, attributes). Creates a new document in the specified space. Invoked through the SDK.
SDK: client.updateDoc(_class, space, objectId, operations). Modifies an existing document. Invoked through the SDK.
SDK: client.removeDoc(_class, space, objectId). Deletes a document. Invoked through the SDK.

item.name: Collections
item.description: Attached-document (collection) operations exposed by the SDK.

request.description: SDK: client.addCollection(...). Creates an attached (collection) document. Invoked through the SDK.
SDK: client.updateCollection(...). Modifies an attached document. Invoked through the SDK.
SDK: client.removeCollection(...). Removes an attached document. Invoked through the SDK.

item.name: Mixins
item.description: Mixin operations exposed by the SDK.

item.name: createMixin - Add a mixin to a document

request.description: SDK: client.createMixin(...). Adds a mixin to an existing document. Invoked through the SDK.
SDK: client.updateMixin(...). Modifies an existing mixin on a document. Invoked through the SDK.

variable.description: Platform transactor WebSocket URL for your Huly deployment (used by the SDK).
Account service URL for your Huly deployment (used by the SDK for auth).
Auth token obtained from the Huly account service.
